svg.text: Best run AL-20260331-017 reached 1.3429 val_bpb. 132 scored runs are tracked here, with 32 kept and 100 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260401-065 (discard) tested if lower-stage sharing is viable, the saved budget is better spent on one extra upper reasoning step.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
